mapper.select: SELECT pm.id, pm.promotion_no, pm.merchant_no, pm.merchant_name, pm.start_time, pm.end_time, pm.total_quota, pm.used_quota, pm.total_discount_amount, pm.status, pm.bind_source, pm.remark, pm.created_at, pm.updated_at, pm.deleted FROM fee_promotion_merchant pm INNER JOIN fee_promotion p ON pm.promotion_no = p.promotion_no AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE pm.deleted = 0 AND pm.merchant_no = #{merchantNo} AND pm.status = 1 AND pm.start_time <= #{currentTime} AND pm.end_time >= #{currentTime} ORDER BY pm.created_at DESC

SELECT id, promotion_no, merchant_no, merchant_name, start_time, end_time, total_quota, used_quota, total_discount_amount, status, bind_source, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM fee_promotion_merchant WHERE deleted = 0 AND promotion_no = #{promotionNo} AND merchant_no = #{merchantNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE fee_promotion_merchant SET used_quota = used_quota + 1, total_discount_amount = COALESCE(total_discount_amount, 0) + #{discountAmount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
